## Summary

Describe the change.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Specification clarification
- [ ] New requirement
- [ ] Template update
- [ ] Example update
- [ ] Schema update
- [ ] Editorial fix

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is practical for open-source maintainers.
- [ ] The change avoids unnecessary tooling requirements.
- [ ] Examples or templates were updated if needed.
- [ ] The change is backwards-compatible or compatibility impact is explained.
